lock_screen.title: Aegis Vault
lock_screen.unlock_hint: Your vault stays encrypted on this device until authentication succeeds.
lock_screen.integrity_blocked: The vault was not opened because of the device security policy. Try switching security hardening to Moderate.
lock_screen.wrong_secret: The vault key could not be verified. Reset biometric unlock and try again with your recovery backup.
lock_screen.migration_failed: The vault key upgrade could not be completed. The operation was stopped to protect your data.
lock_screen.storage_unavailable: Secure storage is currently unavailable. Check your device lock and biometric settings.

vault.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this?
vault.empty_desc: Add your first encrypted record to start building a safer offline vault.
vault.empty_filtered_desc: Try a different search term or clear the active category filter.

breach_extra.privacy_message: This check is optional. Your full password never leaves the device. Only the first 5 characters of a SHA-1 hash prefix are sent to the HIBP API, and the result is cached locally for up to 7 days with a device-bound keyed cache.
breach_extra.unavailable_desc: The breach service could not be reached right now. Try again later.
breach_extra.rotate_now: Rotate this password immediately if the account is still active.

passkey.import_success: Passkey JSON data was applied to the entry.
passkey.native_unavailable: Android passkey support is currently unavailable
passkey.native_hint: Enter a username and domain to create an on-device passkey and save local metadata for this vault entry.
passkey.scope_notice: This offline flow uses a locally generated challenge unless a relying-party server provides one. It is not a full server-side WebAuthn deployment by itself.
passkey.native_unavailable_message: This device, Android version, or current session could not start the passkey flow. Reopen the app and try again.
passkey.native_create_success: Passkey metadata was captured from the device flow and linked to the entry.
passkey.native_create_failed: Passkey creation could not be completed.
passkey.native_auth_success: Passkey verification completed on the device flow.
passkey.backend_create_success: Passkey was created and verified with the relying-party backend.
passkey.backend_create_failed: Backend passkey registration could not be completed.
passkey.backend_auth_success: Passkey verification completed with the relying-party backend.
passkey.backend_missing: Configure the RP backend in Passkey Settings to enable full server verification.
passkey.create_prereq: To create a passkey, enter at least a username and a URL or RP ID.
passkey.auth_prereq: To verify a passkey, first create or import a credential.

errors.challenge_expired: The server challenge expired or was already used. Start the passkey flow again.
errors.challenge_invalid: The backend rejected the challenge. Refresh the flow and try again.
errors.rp_mismatch: The passkey RP ID or origin does not match the backend policy.
errors.credential_mismatch: The selected credential does not match the account or allowed credential list.
errors.server_unavailable: The passkey backend is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
errors.network_error: The app could not reach the passkey backend. Check network and backend URL settings.
errors.contract_error: The backend response did not match the expected WebAuthn contract.
errors.configuration_error: Passkey backend settings are incomplete or invalid.
errors.unknown: The backend passkey flow could not be completed.

readiness.title: Smoke test readiness
readiness.subtitle: Confirm these prerequisites before running staging or real-device passkey tests.

validation.title: Field validation capture
validation.subtitle: Record device evidence and outcome notes while you run passkey smoke tests.
validation.notes_placeholder: Observed behavior, warnings, backend codes, or reproduction details
validation.saved: Validation record saved to the field validation workspace.
validation.save_failed: Validation record could not be saved.
validation.missing_identity: Enter at least device ID, vendor, and model before saving.

capture_notes.prereq_missing: Smoke test blocked because passkey prerequisites were incomplete.
capture_notes.credential_missing: Smoke test blocked because no credential was available for authentication.
capture_notes.native_create_success: Native Android passkey creation completed successfully.
capture_notes.native_auth_success: Native Android passkey authentication completed successfully.

entry_form.subtitle: Choose the category first, then fill only the fields this record needs.

entry_detail.subtitle: Sensitive fields remain masked until you explicitly reveal or copy them.

generator.title: Generate Strong Passwords
generator.subtitle: Cryptographically secure generation stays on this device.
generator.options_hint: Tune character sets for compatibility without reducing randomness unnecessarily.

settings.title: Settings

overview.title: Security settings at a glance
overview.desc: Review the most important vault protections and jump directly to high-impact actions.

quick.title: Quick actions
quick.security_report_desc: Review weak, reused and aging secrets.
quick.backup_desc: Export or import encrypted vault files.
quick.lock_desc: Immediately close and protect the vault.

settings.subtitle: Vault security configurations

security_hardening.title: Security hardening
security_hardening.desc: Controls used before and during unlock. Strict mode blocks rooted or high-risk devices.

settings.exclude_ambiguous_desc: Optional readability mode. When off, generated passwords use the full selected character set for maximum entropy.
settings.err_save_config: Security settings could not be saved. Please try again.

crash_monitoring.title: Crash Monitoring
crash_monitoring.empty: No crash report has been captured on this device.
crash_monitoring.clear_confirm: Delete all locally stored crash reports?

breach_check.title: Optional Breach Check
breach_check.desc: Manually query the HIBP k-Anonymity API for a password when needed. The full password never leaves the device, and local cache entries are device-bound.

shared_vaults.title: Family / Team Spaces
shared_vaults.desc: Create local shared spaces, assign roles, and review sharing hygiene without turning the vault into a cloud service.

settings.import_export_desc: Bitwarden, 1Password, CSV, JSON and encrypted vaults
settings.cloud_desc: Encrypted remote WebDAV / HTTP API storage
settings.about_desc:
Aegis Vault Android v4.2.0
SQLCipher + JSI + Argon2id

autofill.title: 🔑 Autofill (Auto-Fill)
autofill.enable_desc: Select Aegis as your autofill service in Android settings.
autofill.steps:
1. Click the button above → select "Aegis Vault"
2. Unlock the vault with biometrics (syncs automatically)
3. Tap any password field in any app or browser
4. Select the Aegis suggestion

wear_os.title: ⌚ Smartwatch (Wear OS)
wear_os.desc: Display your favorite TOTP codes on your watch
wear_os.no_watch: No paired Wear OS watch found
wear_os.standalone_desc: Watch can generate codes without phone connection
wear_os.security_warning: Your favorite codes will be stored on your watch, even if encrypted.

integrity.title: 🛡 Device Integrity
integrity.reason_play_integrity_empty_token: Play Integrity returned an empty token
integrity.reason_play_services_unavailable_or_requ: Google Play services unavailable or request blocked

audit.title: 📜 Security Audit Log
audit.compacted_unlock: {{count}} vault unlocks compacted into one audit entry

security_report.title: Password Health Report
security_report.subtitle: Review weak, reused, and similar secrets in one place.
security_report.entrypoint_desc: Score password risk across the vault and jump into problematic entries quickly.
security_report.no_issues: No significant password health issue was found.

action.reused: Replace reused secrets with unique values first.
action.incomplete: Complete empty or incomplete entries to reduce lockout and recovery risk.
action.weak: Use strong secrets with at least 16 characters wherever possible.
action.similar: Avoid small mutations; generate fully unrelated random values.
action.healthy: No critical finding. Keep rotating high-value account secrets periodically.

issue_message.weak: This secret looks short or predictable. Use a longer random value.
issue_message.reused: This secret is reused across multiple entries. Rotate all duplicates.
issue_message.similar: This secret is too similar to another entry. Use a fully unrelated value.
issue_message.empty: This field is empty or incomplete. Fill it in to reduce lockout and recovery risk.

hardening.title: Account Hardening
hardening.checked: Analyzed {{count}} login entries for local hardening signals
hardening.no_issues: No major account hardening issue was found.

action.missing_2fa: Add TOTP or a related passkey to password-based accounts first.
action.stale_secret: Rotate secrets that have not changed for 180+ days.
action.missing_identity: Complete username/email and domain metadata for login entries.
action.healthy: 2FA coverage and account metadata look healthy for the current vault.

message.missing_2fa: This login uses a password but has no local TOTP seed and no related passkey entry.
message.stale_secret: This login secret appears older than 180 days and should be reviewed for rotation.
message.missing_identity: This login is missing a username/email or normalized domain, which weakens autofill and recovery quality.

security_center.title: 🛡️ Security Center
security_center.subtitle: Monitor vault-wide risk signals and take action on critical findings.
security_center.metrics_hint: The highest local signals are surfaced first so large vaults stay scannable.
security_center.triage_hint: Open the entry to fix it, or mark it reviewed when the risk is accepted.

issue.missing_2fa: Login entries without TOTP or passkey protection.
issue.aging_credentials: Credentials older than 180 days that need rotation.
issue.sensitive_sharing: Shared entries without a completed access review.
issue.missing_identity: Login entries missing username or domain metadata.
issue.alias_exposure: Alias addresses that are exposed, reused too broadly, or due for rotation.
issue.weak_password: Password entries with short, low-variety, or repeated-character secrets.
issue.reused_password: The same password is reused across multiple vault entries.

action.missing_2fa: Add TOTP or a related passkey to password-based accounts first.
action.aging_credentials: Rotate secrets that have not changed for 180+ days.
action.sensitive_sharing: Complete the access review for shared sensitive entries.
action.missing_identity: Fill in username/email and domain for login entries.
action.alias_exposure: Rotate exposed aliases and prefer one alias per important service.
action.weak_password: Replace weak secrets with strong generated passwords.
action.reused_password: Rotate reused passwords so every important account has a unique secret.

detail.missing_2fa: This login has no TOTP seed and no related passkey.
detail.aging_credentials: This credential appears older than 180 days.
detail.sensitive_sharing: This shared entry has not been reviewed.
detail.missing_identity: This entry is missing username or domain metadata.
detail.alias_exposure: This login has an exposed alias, a rotation flag, or high alias reuse.
detail.weak_password: This password fails local Watchtower strength checks.
detail.reused_password: This password is reused by another vault entry.

security_center.no_issues: No security issues found. Your vault looks healthy!

roadmap_center.title: Initiative Center
roadmap_center.subtitle: Turn the 2026 priority list into a measurable rollout with bilingual and dark-mode-ready execution.

passkey.title: Backend-verified passkey rollout
passkey.summary: {{entries}} passkey entries, {{rpConnected}} RP-connected flows, {{serverVerified}} server-verified records.
passkey.next_no_passkeys: Start with one production-grade RP flow and convert a real account end to end.
passkey.next_enable_rp: Connect the Android passkey helper to relying-party registration and authentication endpoints.
passkey.next_enable_verification: Complete server verification and show verified state inside the product flow.
passkey.next_expand: Expand verified passkeys to more high-value accounts and make the flow the default.

security.title: Security Center v2 and breach intelligence
security.summary: Risk score {{score}}/100, {{triage}} open triage items, {{missingSecondFactor}} accounts still missing a second factor, breach check: {{breachEnabled}}.
security.next_enable_breach: Enable breach intelligence by default for high-risk review flows and keep it privacy-preserving.
security.next_resolve_queue: Burn down the triage queue and surface the most urgent findings first.
security.next_expand: Deepen offline and semi-offline intelligence with richer remediation flows and review history.

sync.title: Sync health and field validation
sync.summary: Relay: {{relayConfigured}}, certificate pin: {{certificatePinned}}, validated sync sequence: {{sequence}}, field runs: {{validationRuns}}.
sync.next_configure_relay: Configure a real relay endpoint and session so the product can prove live sync readiness.
sync.next_add_pin: Add certificate pinning to every relay environment before wider rollout.
sync.next_validate_field: Run field validation and show last-known sync confidence directly in the UX.
sync.next_expand: Add more trust signals around sync freshness, conflict handling, and recovery confidence.

sharing.title: Sharing, invites, and membership lifecycle
sharing.summary: {{spaces}} shared spaces, {{activeMembers}} active members, {{pendingMembers}} pending members, {{reviewedSensitive}} reviewed sensitive assignments.
sharing.next_create_space: Create the first real family or team space and define its ownership model.
sharing.next_invite_members: Move from structure to lifecycle by adding pending and active members with clear roles.
sharing.next_review_sensitive: Review sensitive shared assignments and make approval state visible to the team.
sharing.next_expand: Broaden invite, approval, and emergency-access coverage across more shared scenarios.

pairing.title: Browser extension or desktop pairing bridge
pairing.summary: Autofill support: {{autofillSupported}}, browser-ready records: {{browserReady}}, login records: {{loginEntries}}, paired bridges: {{pairedBridges}}, pending bridges: {{pendingBridges}}.
pairing.next_enable_autofill: Use autofill as the first pairing foundation and validate browser-facing account metadata.
pairing.next_create_bridge: Create the first desktop or browser pairing and validate the approval flow end to end.
pairing.next_add_domains: Normalize more domains and RP IDs so browser and desktop handoff can become reliable.
pairing.next_expand: Layer a dedicated browser or desktop bridge on top of the current Android autofill foundation.

pairing_workspace.title: Pairing Workspace
pairing_workspace.design_desc: Prepare v5-compatible pairings with visible status, expiry and advertised capabilities.
pairing_workspace.subtitle: Create browser-extension or desktop pairings and track which bridges are still waiting for approval.
pairing_workspace.entrypoint_desc: Manage pending and active browser or desktop bridges from one place.
pairing_workspace.create_subtitle: Generate a short-lived bridge code for a browser extension or desktop companion.
pairing_workspace.label: Bridge label
pairing_workspace.list_subtitle: Pending pairings can be approved after the browser extension or desktop client presents the code.
pairing_workspace.empty: No browser or desktop bridge exists yet.

validation_workspace.title: Validation Workspace
validation_workspace.subtitle: Track device-matrix evidence, passkey smoke-test outcomes, and rollout confidence in one place.
validation_workspace.entrypoint_desc: Review field-validation records, filter device evidence, and see rollout readiness at a glance.

filters.title: Filters
filters.search_placeholder: Search device, owner, notes, or evidence path

records.title: Captured records
records.empty_hint: Save a passkey field-validation record to start building your device evidence workspace.

matrix.title: Device matrix board
matrix.subtitle: {{devices}} devices and {{rows}} planned validation rows are tracked here.

sync_health.title: Sync confidence
sync_health.subtitle: See relay reachability, certificate pin coverage, and last-known sync trust signals.
sync_health.no_check: Relay health has not been checked yet.
sync_health.no_success: No successful sync has been recorded yet.

cloud.title: ☁️ Cloud Synchronization (Optional)
cloud.design_desc: Use HTTPS, certificate pinning and your local backup password before any vault payload moves.
cloud.info: 💡 Your vault is encrypted independently from the device database using AES-256-GCM before uploading. Following the Zero-Knowledge principle, nobody can read the data on the server.
cloud.err_url: Please enter a valid URL (http:// or https://)
cloud.err_len: Cloud sync password must be at least 6 characters.
cloud.success_up: Vault has been securely uploaded to the cloud.

sync.title: 🔄 Advanced Synchronization (Relay)
sync.info: End-to-End encrypted relay sync allows real-time data sharing between your devices.
sync.how_body: The relay server is the transport service that carries encrypted sync packages between devices and cannot read the plaintext vault data. The session ID is the shared room code that groups devices into the same sync channel. To use this feature, enter the same relay URL and the same session ID on every device, keep the vault unlocked, and then start synchronization.
sync.self_hosted_hint: You can use your own relay server. Add your custom endpoint and verify connectivity before syncing.
sync.self_hosted_health_ok: Relay server is reachable and healthy.
sync.security_notice_body: Use only HTTPS relay endpoints and a valid sha256 certificate pin. Sync is blocked when secure transport is unavailable.
sync.err_missing: Relay server URL and session ID are required.
sync.err_url: Relay server URL must start with https://.
sync.err_locked: The vault must be unlocked before synchronization can run.
sync.err_failed: Relay synchronization could not be completed.
sync.err_pin_format: Certificate pin format must be: sha256/<base64>
sync.err_native_secure_transport: Pinned native relay transport is not available on this build.
sync.server_create_fallback: Relay server reachable. Local session generated: {{sessionId}}

passkeys.title: 🔑 Passkey Management
passkeys.info: Manage FIDO2 passkey bind records here, revoking access for lost/stolen devices.
passkeys.status_ready: Android native passkey enrollment is ready
passkeys.bind_failed: Passkey binding could not be completed.
passkeys.enroll_info: This flow creates a new passkey on-device using Android Credential Manager/FIDO2 and stores the app-side binding record.
passkeys.status_unavailable_desc: Native passkey enrollment could not be started on this device or in this session. Reopen the app and try again.
passkeys.validation_required: Username and RP ID are required to create a passkey.

backend.title: Relying-party backend
backend.desc: Configure the WebAuthn backend used for production-grade passkey registration and verification.
backend.https_only_notice: Only HTTPS backend URLs are accepted for passkey registration and verification.
backend.err_url_https: Passkey backend URL must start with https://.

backup.title: Backup
backup.hero_desc: Create encrypted backups for daily use, keep plaintext exports behind an explicit warning, and import from trusted managers.
backup.exp_note: Export all items from your vault. The encrypted format is the safest option.
backup.warn_text: CSV and JSON formats are plain text. Prefer the encrypted export.
backup.plain_export_desc: CSV and JSON files are saved as plain text. Anyone who can access the file can read vault data. For safety, prefer the encrypted Aegis export.
backup.plain_export_private_note: This version saves plain-text exports to the app's private storage first. Review the risk before sharing the file elsewhere.
backup.imp_note: Select an exported file from supported apps. Automatic format detection is active.
backup.enc_exp_desc: This password will be required to open the file. Choose a secure password.
backup.err_len8: Password must be at least 8 characters.
backup.err_min_len: Password must be at least {{count}} characters.
backup.dec_imp_desc: This file is encrypted. Enter the password you used during export.
backup.fmt_canonical_desc: Desktop v5 compatible canonical export for migration, sync validation, and encrypted bundle audits.

att.succ_m: File added to the encrypted vault.

shared.modal_subtitle: Manage local family and team spaces without moving your vault online.
shared.design_desc: Keep roles, emergency access and review status visible before assigning sensitive records.
shared.name: Space name
shared.description_placeholder: Who uses this space and what belongs here?
shared.allow_export: Allow exporting entries assigned to this space
shared.notes_placeholder: Who can use this entry and under which conditions?
shared.no_spaces_hint: No family or team space exists yet. Create one in Settings before assigning entries.

donation.title: ❤ Support Aegis
donation.subtitle: Help us keep the project free and open-source
donation.description: If you like Aegis, you can support us by donating cryptocurrency. All donations help with development and server costs.

trash.title: Recycle Bin
trash.subtitle: Deleted items are stored here
trash.design_desc: Restore mistakes safely or permanently remove records when you are ready.
trash.empty_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete all items in the bin?
trash.delete_perm_confirm: This item will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

history.title: Password History
history.empty: No password history for this entry.
history.restore_confirm: Restore the selected historical value as the current secret?
history.restore_failed: Failed to restore from password history.

reset.vault_desc: Delete all passwords and attachments. Settings and biometric keys will be kept.
reset.vault_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset your vault? This will delete all your records forever!
reset.factory_desc: Completely wipe everything. Database, settings, and biometric keys will be destroyed.
reset.factory_confirm: CRITICAL: This will permanently delete everything and reset the app to its initial state. Are you absolutely sure?
reset.panic_desc: Immediately lock and securely wipe all local vault data and security traces.
reset.panic_confirm: CRITICAL: Panic wipe immediately removes vault data and local traces. Continue?
reset.factory_success: App has been factory reset. It will now restart.

qr_scanner.hint: Align the TOTP QR code within the frame

hw_key.insert_usb: Insert the USB key into your device

wear_os.sync_success: {{count}} favorites successfully pushed to your watch.

security.entropy_minimum_warning: Password is below the minimum entropy threshold ({{threshold}} bits)
security.tamper_signature_invalid: APK signature invalid — app may be tampered
security.tamper_frida: Frida injection detected — dynamic analysis tool active
security.tamper_xposed: Xposed Framework detected — hooking framework active
security.hibp_breached: This password appeared {{count}} times in breaches — change it immediately!
security.hibp_safe: This password was not found in known breaches
security.hibp_privacy_note: Your full password is never sent to the server (k-anonymity)
